mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN u.gender = 1 THEN '女性' WHEN u.gender = 2 THEN '男性' ELSE '未知' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM pet_adopt_order pao LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = pao.user_id WHERE pao.status IN (2, 4) GROUP BY name ORDER BY FIELD(name, '女性', '男性', '未知')

SELECT age_bucket AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN u.birthday IS NULL THEN '未知' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, u.birthday, CURDATE()) <= 22 THEN '22岁及以下' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, u.birthday, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 23 AND 30 THEN '23-30岁' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, u.birthday, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 31 AND 40 THEN '31-40岁' ELSE '41岁及以上' END AS age_bucket, CASE WHEN u.birthday IS NULL THEN 5 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, u.birthday, CURDATE()) <= 22 THEN 1 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, u.birthday, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 23 AND 30 THEN 2 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, u.birthday, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 31 AND 40 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END AS sort_no FROM pet_adopt_order pao LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = pao.user_id WHERE pao.status IN (2, 4) ) age_stat GROUP BY age_bucket, sort_no ORDER BY sort_no

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(pao.create_time, '%Y-%m') AS name, ROUND(AVG(DATEDIFF(pao.create_time, p.create_time)), 1) AS count FROM pet_adopt_order pao LEFT JOIN pet p ON p.id = pao.pet_id WHERE pao.status IN (2, 4) AND p.create_time IS NOT NULL AND pao.create_time >= p.create_time GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(pao.create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(pao.create_time, '%Y-%m')
